programs.title: Find Me a Beach House
programs.desc: Julie and David look for a home that can double as an investment as well as a forever home in Silicon Beach, Calif.

programs.title: Selling Jets
programs.desc: Mike is a yacht captain employed by a wealthy New York business executive to operate and maintain his luxury yacht based in the Bahamas; his employer has asked him to look into assisting him in purchasing a private jet.

programs.title: Travel in Style
programs.desc: Every year the rich and famous head to St. Tropez to sunbathe; the temples in Sri Lanka.

programs.title: Road Less Traveled
programs.desc: Jonathan mounts a motorcycle to explore Scotland and visit to remote distilleries to savor never heard of scotch; he descends into the countries pagan past of druids, witches and sorcerers.

programs.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programs.desc: Marco and Allie tour the Pine Tree Rat Pack house with Tara West; Steve makes his last pitch to convince Allie to leave San Diego.

programs.title: Dream Purchase
programs.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream; everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing; for some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.
